title: potentilla recta subsp. fallacina
intro: Potentilla recta subsp. fallacina, also known as fallacious potentilla or upright cinquefoil, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Potentilla recta subsp. fallacina include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, with the leaves and flowers being the most commonly used parts.
